content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.financial.token_scanner
FILE: cosmos/integration/financial/token_scanner.py (648 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Token Scanner for Swarm Chat.

Detects contract addresses dropped in chat and provides DEEP token analysis:
- DexScreener market data
- Bankr trading info
- X/Twitter social search via Grok
- Collective analysis for risk assessment

"Drop any CA in chat - Cosmos scans it for you."

CLASSES:
- TokenScanner: Scans chat messages for contract addresses and provides DEEP token analysis.

Fe
  Methods: def dex_screener(self)
  Methods: def bankr_client(self)
  Methods: def grok_provider(self)
  Methods: def detect_ca(self, message: str) -> Optional[Dict[str, str]]
  Methods: async def scan_token(self, address: str, chain: str=None) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]
  Methods: async def search_x_mentions(self, symbol: str, address: str) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]
  Methods: async def get_deep_analysis(self, token_info: Dict[str, Any]) -> str
  Methods: async def format_response_async(self, token_info: Dict[str, Any]) -> str

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- async def scan_message_for_token(content: str) -> Optional[str]
